title: OliverPack
description:
CPvP Texture Pack of an Albino Otter
(Ft. E-Z)
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed98d2919991750b8ac06f013470f28789043015.png)
**Pack Version** (Last)**:** v1.1

**Created by:** 
> Me ( [@GalacticUniv](https://discord.gg/72dHTWJr6R) )

**Available in the following versions:**
> 1.7.10 - 1.8.9 | 1.16 - 1.20.1 | 1.20.2+

**Tags**: 
> Service, Custom Color, 32x, Otter, E-Z

**Description:**
> Oliver is another texture pack I was commissioned to create (yes, I was paid for this one!). It was one of the largest commissions I’ve ever done, and I’m incredibly grateful for that. <3 The main theme revolves around Aiden’s pet (the creator of E-Z), an adorable otter, by the way!
> 
> Most of the texture pack keeps the vanilla colors for tools but enhances the overall look of the textures significantly. The inventory, however, gets a complete makeover with a beautiful, stylized image of Oliver, so you can enjoy his cuteness and take him with you wherever you go. If you’re an otter fan—or have one as a pet—this pack is absolutely perfect for you!

> Don't forget that downloading the texture pack from the official sources (In PlanetMinecraft) is a huge way to support us! <3

> If you have any questions or want to report a bug, feel free to do so through our official Discord:
> <https://discord.gg/72dHTWJr6R>

> Join E-Z discord server!: <https://discord.gg/ez>

> You can also follow us on social media! :D
> <https://solo.to/galacticuniv>
